subject: Web chat → voice → email: duplicate billing prorate (BL-44219)

dialog.body: Hi — I see two identical charges on my April invoice for $284. Can someone help?
Hi Diane, I'm Naomi — sorry about that. Can I have your account email so I can pull up the invoice?

Thanks. I can see a duplicate prorate from the seat-count change on the 12th. There's a credit memo workflow I'd rather walk through on a quick call so we don't bounce links back and forth — okay if I send you our number?
Great — call +1-737-555-0101 and quote ticket BL-44219, you'll route straight back to me.

Subject: Credit memo CM-44219 — refund confirmation (BL-44219)
From: Naomi Sayid <naomi.sayid@helix.example>
To: Diane Metzger <diane.metzger@example.com>

Hi Diane,

Thanks for hopping on the call. Confirming the duplicate charge has been credited and the refund of $284.00 is on its way to your new card on file. You should see it land in 3–5 business days.

I've attached the credit memo (CM-44219) for your records.

Anything else come up, just reply here or open a new chat — quote BL-44219 and you'll route back to me.

Thanks,
Naomi

Customer reported a duplicate $284 prorate on the April invoice via web chat (BL-44219). Agent Naomi authenticated her by email, escalated to a voice call for the refund workflow, captured explicit recording consent, processed credit memo CM-44219 with refund to a new card. PCI (card number) and PII (email) segments redacted from the transcript and recording.
